channel.name: CRRT to HL7
channel.description: Reads CRRT circuit snapshots from the healthcare-v2 CRRT Simulator REST API (via device_exporter) and transforms therapy parameters to HL7 v2.5.1 ORU^R01 messages for hospital integration.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Parse CRRT snapshot
Build HL7 ORU^R01 — CRRT circuit parameters
